skills.title: aesthetic
supportWhen: 默认用于视觉层级、审美判断、设计质量提升，并与 frontend-design 组成 UI 主组合。
需要做 inspiration analysis、aesthetic review 或视觉 refinement 时。

skills.title: brainstorming
skills.summary: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.
supportWhen: 默认用于前置问题建模、需求拆解、范围澄清和进入实现前的思考主流程。
需要决定是否进一步进入 writing-plans、planner agent 或其它执行路径时。

skills.title: browser
supportWhen: 需要直接附着或控制 CDP / remote debugging
需要在页面上下文里执行临时 JavaScript
需要轻量脚本式浏览器操作，而不是完整用户流程

skills.title: browser-use
supportWhen: 需要真实浏览器、真实 profile、cookies、cache、登录态
需要表单填写、页面流程验证、截图、信息提取
需要更接近真实用户路径的浏览器自动化

skills.title: chrome-devtools
supportWhen: 需要 network / performance / console / DOM 调试
需要更接近 DevTools 面板能力的排查
需要对页面加载、请求、性能问题做低层分析

skills.title: claude-code
skills.summary: Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding tool that lives in the terminal and helps turn ideas into code faster. It combines autonomous planning, execution, and validation with extensibility through skills, plugins, MCP servers, and hooks.

skills.title: code-review
supportWhen: 默认用于代码审查、完成前复核、提交前确认以及处理 review 语义主流程。
需要统一调度 code-reviewer agent、自审和 verification 规则时。

skills.title: continuous-learning
supportWhen: 需要在 session 结束后快速提取可复用模式，而不是做完整的 problem-solution 复盘时。
需要沿用 legacy end-of-session learning 流程补充 observation 时。

skills.title: continuous-learning-v2
supportWhen: 重点是 hooks / observation / instinct 候选采集，而不是用户可见的学习主流程时。
需要补充行为层自动观察与 session instrumentation 时。

skills.title: databases
supportWhen: 涉及数据模型、查询、索引、schema 设计或数据库诊断时优先使用。

skills.title: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.summary: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies

skills.title: django-tdd
supportWhen: 任务明确落在 Django 上下文，需要使用 pytest-django 或 Django/DRF 专用测试模式时。

skills.title: executing-plans
skills.summary: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints

skills.title: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.summary: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work - guides completion of development work by presenting structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup

skills.title: foundation-models-on-device
supportWhen: 任务明确涉及 Apple 端侧模型、on-device generation 或 iOS/macOS 本地 AI 能力时。

skills.title: frontend-design

需要产出 production-grade 可运行界面时。

skills.title: golang-testing
supportWhen: 任务明确落在 Go 上下文，需要 table-driven tests、benchmarks、fuzzing 等 Go testing 模式时。

skills.title: google-adk-python
skills.summary: You are an expert guide for Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) Python - an open-source, code-first toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying AI agents.

skills.title: liquid-glass-design
supportWhen: 任务明确面向 iOS 26 风格、动态材质或原生移动端玻璃拟态视觉时。

skills.title: notebooklm

需要把研究、文档问答和 notebook inventory 管理串成一条稳定工作流时。

skills.title: obsidian-skills
skills.summary: Wrapper skill for Obsidian vault workflows, routing to bundled Obsidian markdown, bases, canvas, CLI, and ingestion skills.
supportWhen: 需要围绕 Obsidian vault、知识库、Canvas 或 note graph 做结构化工作时。
需要把笔记系统、知识沉淀和可视化 note layout 结合在一起时。

skills.title: planning-with-files
supportWhen: 任务跨越多个阶段、多个会话或大量工具调用，需要 durable working memory 时。
需要用 task_plan / findings / progress 这样的文件化状态来稳定推进工作时。

supportWhen: 数据库主战场明确是 PostgreSQL，需要查询优化、索引或 schema 设计时。

skills.title: python-patterns
supportWhen: 任务明确落在 Python 工程实现、数据处理或自动化脚本上下文时。

skills.title: python-testing
supportWhen: 任务明确落在 Python 上下文，需要 pytest、fixtures、mocking、coverage 等 Python testing 模式时。

skills.title: receiving-code-review
skills.summary: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions, especially if feedback seems unclear or technically questionable - requires technical rigor and verification, not performative agreement or blind implementation
supportWhen: 重点是处理 review feedback、判断反馈是否成立、避免机械接受建议时。

skills.title: requesting-code-review

supportWhen: 重点是组织 review 输入、准备 diff、调用 code-reviewer agent 等发起 review 的子流程时。

skills.title: self-improving-agent
supportWhen: 默认用于学习、复盘、沉淀经验以及决定是否升级到 instinct、learned skill、role-pack 或 stack-pack。
需要把 durable output 写回 Forge 统一 memory targets 时。

skills.title: skill-prompt-generator

supportWhen: 需要围绕 prompt generation / prompt analysis / prompt library 做系统化工作时。

skills.title: skill-stocktake

skills.title: springboot-tdd

skills.title: subagent-driven-development

skills.title: systematic-debugging

skills.title: tdd-workflow
supportWhen: 默认用于测试驱动开发、先写测试再实现以及统一 testing 主流程。

skills.title: test-driven-development
skills.summary: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code
supportWhen: 需要强调严格的 TDD 方法论或沿用既有 test-driven-development skill 语义时。

skills.title: using-superpowers
skills.summary: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions

skills.title: verification-before-completion
skills.summary: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs - requires running verification commands and confirming output before making any success claims; evidence before assertions always

skills.title: web-design-guidelines

skills.title: webapp-testing

skills.title: writing-plans

skills.title: writing-skills
skills.summary: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment
